company.name: AgentsOX
company.purpose: AgentsOX helps businesses of any size run more efficiently with custom technology. We sit with each client one-on-one, get to the real pain points, and build a solution shaped around how that business actually works.
company.positioning: Every project starts from your actual problem, not a template or a fixed product. You work directly with the founder, and the system is built for your business - not adapted from someone else's.

faq.question: What is AgentsOX?
faq.answer: AgentsOX is a small, founder-led team that builds custom tech to help a business run better. You work with us directly - we learn how your business actually works, then build whatever solves the problem, whether you're a one-person shop or a larger company.

faq.question: What can AgentsOX build?
faq.answer: Pretty much anything that makes the business run smoother - AI assistants, automations for the repetitive admin, dashboards, branding and a site that brings people in, even a single workspace to run everything from. If it can be solved with tech, we can probably build it.

faq.question: Who do you help?
faq.answer: Businesses of any size and any industry. The common thread isn't the sector - it's having a workflow that's eating time or losing money. If something's slowing you down, that's usually something we can help with.

faq.question: What can AgentsOX do for real estate offices?
faq.answer: Things like catching leads from WhatsApp or Instagram after hours, routing property inquiries, keeping the CRM updated, and a dashboard that shows what you're missing.

faq.question: What can AgentsOX do for clinics or MedSpas?
faq.answer: Things like handling inquiries, answering common questions, booking support, and follow-ups - while keeping anything sensitive under a real person's review.

faq.question: Do you sell a fixed product?
faq.answer: No. Everything's built around your business - your workflow, your tools, what you're comfortable with. We reuse what we've learned from past work, but you're not getting someone else's template.

faq.question: How does the process work?
faq.answer: We start with one real problem, learn how you handle it now, build the smallest useful version first, and keep improving it until you trust it day to day.

faq.question: Can you work with non-technical businesses?
faq.answer: Definitely. Most of the people we work with don't want to deal with technical complexity - so we explain things plainly, keep it practical, and skip the jargon.

faq.question: Is AI reliable enough for business workflows?
faq.answer: It is when it's kept on a tight leash - clear limits, a human checking the important parts, and a sensible fallback when something's off. We don't hand sensitive decisions to a model and walk away.

faq.question: What about privacy and data?
faq.answer: We sort this out before building anything - what data is actually needed, what should stay private, who gets access, and which integrations make sense. It's part of the first conversation, not an afterthought.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: It depends on what you need - how complex it is, what it connects to, and how much support you want. We can start small with a focused pilot, or build something larger once we've talked it through.

faq.question: What happens after I send the project?
faq.answer: We read through what you sent, get clear on the goal, your current tools, and where the gaps are - then come back with the simplest useful first step to talk about.

answerBoundaries: Don't promise exact pricing before a real conversation.
Don't promise exact timelines before a real conversation.
Don't guarantee a specific integration before checking it's actually possible.
Don't suggest AI will replace someone's team.
Don't lean on AI jargon or hype.
